source:
#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

from datetime import datetime
from pyspark.sql.functions import to_date

import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "fact_ghg_emission_gold"
lake_db_name = "gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

#Set table name
db_tablename="fact_ghg_emission"
dedicated_db_tablename ="FactGHGEmission"

# Step 1:  Tables with current data
df_gas = spark.table("gold.fact_gas_consumption_composition")
df_grid_elec = spark.table("gold.fact_electricity_import_export")
df_fuel = spark.table("gold.fact_fuel_consumption")
df_retail_elec = spark.table("gold.fact_retail_electricity_consumption")
df_gas_current = df_gas.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_grid_elec_current = df_grid_elec.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_fuel_current = df_fuel.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_retail_elec_current = df_retail_elec.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)

df_dim_site = spark.table("gold.dim_site")
df_dim_emission_scope = spark.table("gold.dim_emission_scope")
df_dim_site_current = df_dim_site.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_dim_emission_scope_current = df_dim_emission_scope.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)

# Step 3: Calculate or get Gas Measures
df_ghg_gas = (
    df_gas_current
    .withColumn(
        "GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e",
        F.round(F.col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentKgCO2ePerGJFuel") * F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ") / 1000, 2)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e",
        F.round(F.col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel") * F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ") / 1000, 2)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e",
        F.round(F.col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel") * F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ") / 1000, 2)
    )
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e").alias("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e").alias("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e").alias("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e"),
        F.sum("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ").alias("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ")
    )
)

#display(df_ghg_gas)

# Step 4: Calculate or get fuel measures
df_ghg_fuel = (
    df_fuel_current
    .withColumn("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e", F.round(F.col("DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e", F.round(F.col("DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e", F.round(F.col("PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e", F.round(F.col("PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e"), 2))
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e").alias("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e").alias("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e").alias("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e").alias("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e")
    )
)

#display(df_ghg_fuel)

# Step 5: Calculate or get grid electricity measures

df_ghg_grid = (
    df_grid_elec_current
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", F.round(F.col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"), 2))
    .withColumn("ExportedGenerationMWh", F.round(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh"), 2))
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e"),
        F.sum("GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e").alias("GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e"),
        F.sum("ExportedGenerationMWh").alias("ExportedGenerationMWh")
    )
)

# Step 6: Calculate or get retail electricity measures

df_ghg_retail_elec = (
    df_retail_elec_current
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e").alias("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e"),
        F.sum("MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e").alias("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e")
    )
)


#display(df_ghg_retail_elec)

# Step 7: Total GHG Calculations
df_ghg_totals = (
    df_ghg_gas
    .join(
        df_ghg_fuel.select(
            "DimSiteKey", 
            "DimMonthStartDateKey", 
            "DimEmissionScopeKey",
            "GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e",
            "GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e",
            "GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e",
            "GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e"
        ), 
        on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"],
        how="outer"
    )
    .join(
        df_ghg_grid.select(
            "DimSiteKey",
            "DimMonthStartDateKey",
            "DimEmissionScopeKey",
            "GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e",
            "GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e",
            "GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e",
            "GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e",
            "ExportedGenerationMWh"
        ),
        on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"],
        how="outer"
    )
    .join(
        df_ghg_retail_elec.select(
            "DimSiteKey",
            "DimMonthStartDateKey",
            "DimEmissionScopeKey",
            "RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e",
            "RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e"
        ),
        on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"],
        how="outer"
    )
    .join(
        df_dim_site_current.select("DimSiteKey", "SiteCode"),
        on="DimSiteKey",
        how="left"
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e",
        F.when(F.col("SiteCode").isin("BAR", "KAR", "SBK"),
               F.col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e"))
         .when(F.col("SiteCode") == "WIV",
               F.col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e",
        F.when(F.col("SiteCode").isin("BAR", "KAR", "SBK"),
               F.col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e"))
         .when(F.col("SiteCode") == "WIV",
               F.col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(0))
    )   
    .withColumn(
        "TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e",
        F.coalesce(F.col("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e"), F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e",
        F.coalesce(F.col("GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e",
        F.coalesce(F.col("GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) +
        F.coalesce(F.col("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e",
        F.coalesce(F.col("TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e"), F.lit(0))+
        F.coalesce(F.col("TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e",
        F.coalesce(F.col("TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e"), F.lit(0))+
        F.coalesce(F.col("TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh",
        F.when(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh").isNull(), F.lit(None))  # null -> return None
         .when(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh") == 0, 
               F.coalesce(F.col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) / F.lit(1))  # zero -> max intensity
         .otherwise(
            F.coalesce(F.col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) /
            F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh")  # normal division
         )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh",
        F.when(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh").isNull(), F.lit(None))  # null -> return None
         .when(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh") == 0, 
               F.coalesce(F.col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) / F.lit(1))  # zero -> max intensity
         .otherwise(
            F.coalesce(F.col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e"), F.lit(0)) /
            F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh")  # normal division
         )
    )     
    .withColumn(
        "StationEfficiencyPercent",
        F.when(F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ").isNull(), F.lit(None))
         .when(F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ") == 0,
           F.coalesce(F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh") * F.lit(3.6) * F.lit(100), F.lit(0)) / F.lit(1))  # Max efficiency
         .otherwise(
            (F.col("ExportedGenerationMWh") * F.lit(3.6) * F.lit(100)) /
            F.col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ")  
         )
    )
    )

# Step 8: Create final Gold DataFrame with CDC columns and both hashes

df_gold = (
    df_ghg_totals
    .withColumns({
        "CDCLoadDate": to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCStartDate": to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCEndDate": to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCCurrentFlag": lit(1),
        "CDCOps": lit(1),
        "FactGHGEmissionKey": sha2(
            concat_ws("||", "DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), 256
        ),
         "HashDiff": sha2(concat_ws("||",
        col("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("StationEfficiencyPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string")

    ), 256)

        
    })

)

#display(df_gold)

# Create Gold Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")

spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
    DimSiteKey STRING,
    DimMonthStartDateKey INT,
    DimEmissionScopeKey STRING,
    FactGHGEmissionKey STRING,
    RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh DECIMAL(20,6),
    GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh DECIMAL(20,6),
    TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
    StationEfficiencyPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    CDCOps INT,
    HashDiff STRING
)
USING DELTA
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe

df_gold.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view")

# SCD2 logic
# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactGHGEmissionKey = s.FactGHGEmissionKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (  DimSiteKey ,
                DimMonthStartDateKey ,
                DimEmissionScopeKey ,
                FactGHGEmissionKey ,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e ,
                GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e ,
                GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e,
                GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e ,
                GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e,
                TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e,
                TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e,
                TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e,
                StationEfficiencyPercent,
                CDCLoadDate ,
                CDCStartDate ,
                CDCEndDate ,
                CDCCurrentFlag ,
                CDCOps ,
                HashDiff )
      VALUES (  s.DimSiteKey ,
                s.DimMonthStartDateKey ,
                s.DimEmissionScopeKey ,
                s.FactGHGEmissionKey ,
                s.RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e ,
                s.GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                s.GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e,
                s.GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e ,
                s.GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                s.GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                s.TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e,
                s.TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e,
                s.StationEfficiencyPercent,
                s.CDCLoadDate ,
                s.CDCStartDate ,
                s.CDCEndDate ,
                1,
                s.CDCOps ,
                s.HashDiff )
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactGHGEmissionKey = s.FactGHGEmissionKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (  DimSiteKey ,
                DimMonthStartDateKey ,
                DimEmissionScopeKey ,
                FactGHGEmissionKey ,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e ,
                GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e ,
                GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e,
                GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e,
                GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e ,
                GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e,
                TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e,
                TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e,
                TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e,
                StationEfficiencyPercent,
                CDCLoadDate ,
                CDCStartDate ,
                CDCEndDate ,
                CDCCurrentFlag ,
                CDCOps ,
                HashDiff)
      VALUES (  s.DimSiteKey ,
                s.DimMonthStartDateKey ,
                s.DimEmissionScopeKey ,
                s.FactGHGEmissionKey ,
                s.RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GridImportElectricityGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,
                s.GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e ,
                s.GHGFromDieselFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                s.GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionTransportationTCO2e,
                s.GHGFromUnleadedFuelConsumptionStationaryTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergyTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95UpperLimitTCO2e,
                s.GHGEmissionsFromNaturalGasCombustionStationaryEnergy95LowerLimitTCO2e ,
                s.GHGIntensityLocationBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                s.GHGIntensityMarketBasedTCO2ePerMWh ,
                s.TotalScope1GHGForMonthTCO2e,
                s.TotalScope2GHGForMonthLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalScope2GHGForMonthMarketBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                s.TotalCleanCoGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e,
                s.StationEfficiencyPercent,
                s.CDCLoadDate ,
                s.CDCStartDate ,
                s.CDCEndDate ,
                1,
                s.CDCOps ,
                s.HashDiff )

#Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Gold_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Gold_Update = Gold_Update_Post - Gold_Update_Pre
Gold_Insert = (Gold_Insert_Post - Gold_Insert_Pre) + Gold_Update
Gold_Delete = Gold_Delete_Post - Gold_Delete_Pre
Gold_ActiveRows = Gold_ActiveRecord_Post 
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_Insert,Gold_Update,Gold_Delete,Gold_ActiveRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Prepare to insert into dedicated SQL table

gold_dedicated_sql = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT 
    DimSiteKey ,
 DimMonthStartDateKey ,
                DimEmissionScopeKey ,
                FactGHGEmissionKey ,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsLocationBasedTCO2e,
                RetailElectricityUseGHGEmissionsMarketBasedTCO2e ,

FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool

(gold_dedicated_sql.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{dedicated_db_tablename}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{dedicated_db_tablename}"""))

pipeline_name= "fact_ghg_emission_dedicatedsql"
